name: Sugar Rush Tower
description: Sugar Rush Tower is a delightfully addictive candy stacking game with real physics! Drop colorful candy blocks — bars, jellies, wafers, lollipop discs, and mega candies — onto your growing tower with perfect timing. Chain perfect drops to trigger Sugar Rush combos for massive bonus points! Collect sweet power-ups, earn 3-star ratings on every level, and build the tallest candy tower ever. Simple to play, endlessly satisfying!
instructions: Tap to drop swinging candy blocks onto your tower Perfect timing earns combos and power-ups Stack high without collapsing mdash how tall can you go
